prompt_text: A fluffy, beige, anthropomorphic hamster-like creature stands on a gray stage. The background features draped gray curtains illuminated by a central spotlight. The creature has large brown eyes and detailed fur textures, appearing in a clean, high-resolution 3D animation style.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A fluffy, beige, anthropomorphic hamster-like creature stands on a gray stage. The background features draped gray curtains illuminated by a central spotlight. The creature has large brown eyes and detailed fur textures, appearing in a clean, high-resolution 3D animation style.

cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, eye-level, static camera. Vertical orientation.

actions: The creature gestures with its paws in sync with the music.
It raises a middle finger at the camera.
It performs a shushing motion with a paw over its mouth.
The creature changes facial expressions from playful to smug while swaying slightly.
dialogue: Upbeat Spanish reggaeton music playing throughout the video.
